issues.title: feat(secret): introduce secret.Value opaque type and error-wrap machinery

summary.key_decisions: rework addressed reviewer blockers: strings.ReplaceAll instead of NIH helpers; direct type assertion in Wrap instead of errors.As (prevents silent drop of outer fmt.Errorf layers)

requirements_map.ac: secret runtime Issue 1 full AC list + reviewer blockers
requirements_map.evidence: see per-AC mapping in first commit; reviewer blockers fixed in 804b6d9

reviewer_results.resolution: Both blocking findings addressed in commit 804b6d9e6dc9fc83084bb2af7eaa9b85bd3b1d3b. Pragmatic F1 (hand-rolled replaceAll/indexOf) fixed by using strings.ReplaceAll. Maintainer B1 (Wrap errors.As drops outer layer) fixed by tightening to direct type assertion + regression test TestWrapDoesNotDropOuterLayer.
advisory_deferred: pragmatic F2: Error.Redactor accessor has no production caller
architect non-blocking: secret.Bytes export concern (mitigated by internal/ module boundary)
maintainer A1-A5: documentation polish items (see detail file)

issues.title: feat(vault): provider interface, registry, factory, and fake backend

summary.key_decisions: Issue 2 core + rework: fake backend not-registered-in-DefaultRegistry test now probes DefaultRegistry directly with rollback; added Registry.Unregister for test-only rollback

requirements_map.ac: Issue 2 full AC list + maintainer B1

reviewer_results.resolution: Maintainer B1 addressed in commit baf2e829b8c7342e9594f95e9fb0ae6355e5df9a: TestNotRegisteredInDefaultRegistry rewritten to probe vault.DefaultRegistry directly with rollback; added Registry.Unregister for test-only rollback; added TestRegistryUnregister covering round-trip, unknown-kind error, empty-kind error.
advisory_deferred: pragmatic: fake.NewFactory() wraps empty struct; redundant strings.Contains("#") + parsed.Fragment check; Bundle.CloseAll sort comment overstates benefit; knownProviderNames single-caller helper
architect: Source attribution when ProviderSpec.Source is empty; Factory.Open once-per-spec doc clarification

maintainer advisory: Bundle.CloseAll could use errors.Join; closed-provider error vs network-outage; Provider.Resolve references secret.Errorf without package pointer; typo in Registry.Build doc; ProviderSpec.Source equality caveat placement

issues.title: feat(config): vault schema, env.vars/env.secrets split, MaybeSecret type

summary.key_decisions: Issue 3 core + rework: B1 reserved keyword detection moved to post-decode pass using toml.MetaData.Keys() to emit path-aware errors; B2 named/anonymous registry shape mismatch now produces actionable errors listing declared providers and both fix paths; shape struct computed once per Parse

requirements_map.ac: Issue 3 full AC list + reviewer blockers B1 B2
requirements_map.evidence: see coder returns with per-AC test mapping

reviewer_results.resolution: Both maintainer blockers addressed in commit 3d437f3: B1 reserved-keyword error now points to the sub-table user should use; B2 anonymous-vs-named URI mismatch error lists declared providers and both fix paths. Symmetric named-vs-anonymous error also added.
reviewer_results.out_of_scope_finding_for_issue_4: Architect flagged that internal/workspace/override.go doesn't merge override.Env.Secrets.Values — only Env.Vars is merged. This is a dormant merge gap surfaced by Issue 3's schema addition. Must be fixed in Issue 4 resolver/merge integration.
advisory_deferred: pragmatic: VaultRegistry.IsEmpty() has no callers (speculative); redundant len check in coerceDescriptionMap; MaybeSecret.MarshalText unused
architect: MaybeSecret Plain XOR Secret not mechanically enforced (public fields); extractProviderName could route through vault.ParseRef
maintainer advisory: KnownProviderNames nil-safe call pattern; scaffold template visual separator; stale (Issue 4) pointer comments

issues.title: feat(workspace): resolver stage and apply.go pipeline wiring

summary.key_decisions: Placed resolver in internal/vault/resolve sub-package (not internal/vault/resolver.go) to avoid import cycle: internal/config imports internal/vault (for VersionToken in MaybeSecret.Token); a resolver in internal/vault operating on *config.WorkspaceConfig would cycle. Sub-package internal/vault/resolve depends on both while internal/vault stays config-free. Extended fake backend config to accept map[string]any for TOML-decoded values. Added Bundle.Names() for R12 collision check without exposing internal map. MergeGlobalOverride signature changed to (cfg, error) for team_only reporting; call site + fixtures migrated via mustMerge helper

requirements_map.ac: Issue 4 full AC list + Issue 3 architect finding (env.secrets merge fixed)
requirements_map.evidence: see coder return with 10 per-AC mappings

issues.title: feat(vault): Infisical backend with batch resolve and stderr scrub
feat(workspace): SourceFingerprint and per-source tuples in state.json
feat(workspace): shadow detection and diagnostics across apply/status
feat(cli): vault flags, status subcommands, bootstrap pointer
